2018-T1-P6-S2.trunk: 并列双分句(and) + 冒号总结：Taxes … need to be cut, and wage subsidies … should be expanded：This would …（应减税、扩大补贴：这会…）
structure: 分句①：Taxes on low-wage labor need to be cut
并列(and)分句②：wage subsidies such as the earned income tax credit should be expanded
冒号后（总结，This + 四个并列谓语）：This would boost incomes, encourage work, reward companies for job creation, and reduce inequality
2018-T1-P6-S2.logic: and 连接两项政策建议（need to be cut / should be expanded，均被动）；冒号后 This 指代前述措施，带四个并列谓语说明效果。
notes: 两分句均为被动：need to be cut / should be expanded（应被削减/扩大）。
冒号后 This 指代前述措施；四个并列谓语：boost…, encourage…, reward…, and reduce…。
reward companies for job creation：reward sb for sth（因…奖励）。

2018-T1-P1-S1.trunk: 完全倒装：Among the … challenges … is one …（中产面临的诸多烦心挑战中，有一个…）
structure: 完全倒装：Among the annoying challenges facing the middle class is one（= one … is among the challenges）
├ 现在分词作定语〔修饰 challenges〕：facing the middle class
└ 定语从句〔that，修饰 one〕：that will probably go unmentioned in the next presidential campaign
冒号后（设问，解释 one）：What happens when the robots come for their jobs?
└ 时间状语从句(when)：when the robots come for their jobs
2018-T1-P1-S1.logic: Among… is one 是地点状语前置的完全倒装（真正主语 one）；facing… 现在分词定语修饰 challenges；that 定语从句修饰 one；冒号引出该 challenge 的具体内容（设问）。
notes: Among … is one：地点状语前置引起的完全倒装（真正主语是 one）。
challenges facing the middle class：facing… 现在分词作定语；that will… go unmentioned：that 定语从句修饰 one。
冒号后是设问句（解释 one 是什么）；come for 来抢夺。

2018-T1-P7-S1.trunk: 并列双分句(yet)：① Technology will improve society … ② this will be little comfort to those …
structure: 分句①：Technology will improve society in ways big and small over the next few years
└ 后置形容词：ways big and small（= big and small ways）
并列(yet)分句②：this will be little comfort to those who find their lives and careers upended by automation
└ 定语从句〔who，修饰 those〕：who find their lives and careers upended by automation
└ find + 宾 + 宾补(过去分词)：find their lives and careers upended
2018-T1-P7-S1.logic: yet 连接转折两分句；ways big and small 后置形容词修饰 ways；who 定语从句修饰 those；find sth upended（发现…被颠覆，宾补为过去分词）。
notes: ways big and small：形容词后置修饰 ways（大大小小的方式）。
yet 连接转折分句（然而）。
those who find their lives and careers upended by automation：who 定语从句修饰 those；find + 宾语 + 过去分词宾补（发现…被自动化颠覆）。
